title: Column settings & permissions for FIRST column (item name)
excerpt: Pretty simply, I need to make sure my team members do not change the name of an item, which is located in the first column. Every other column has a “Restrict Column Editing” feature. Why not item names??

posts.author: jjc (jjc)
posts.cookedHtml: Pretty simply, I need to make sure my team members do not change the name of an item, which is located in the first column. Every other column has a “Restrict Column Editing” feature. Why not item names??
